subcodes.first_line: O thou whose brother was martyred in the path of his Glorious, All-Forgiving Lord! Blessed art thou for having been bound to such a soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استشهد اخوه فی سبیل ربه العزیز الغفور طوبی لک بما انتسبت الی النفس
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
